feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: #CoE#JMTHY删除销售订单权限控制
entry.content: 用户想要在删除销售订单是加控制，要求要判断当前用户不能删除，想问下从哪里能获取当前用户的值或者字段，目前只能找到创建者。

entry.title: How to keep PDF file created by output control?
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

I would like to know how to keep PDF form that be created by output control, e.g. purchase order form.

In my understanding, there is a feature in ECC. I want to use this function in S/4HANA public cloud.

With my experience of ECC, we can select "Print and Archive" in the output control settings. With this setting, we can see the form later which was printed past day. (Reprint function uses as-is data. I want to see the original form with data at printing.)

Can you give me advice to achive this requirement?

entry.title: Cannot change unit for statistical key figure in S4 Test System
entry.content:
In the App - "Manage Statistical Key Figures" App a Statistical Key Figure was created with the wrong unit. Documents have been posted against this. After the Statistical Key Figure cannot be changed. 

Is it possible to change this? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How delivery type is being determined in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

1. I am trying to figure out how delivery type is being determined in S/4HANA Public Cloud. From the following link, I understand there are no copying control from sales document to delivery document in S/4HANA Public Cloud. Also, I could not find anything in the Custom Logic app as well. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-to-find-the-copy-controls-from-sales-order-to-delivery-in-s-4hana-cloud/qaq-p/13605154/comment-id/4179745#M4179745

2. We cannot even create new sales document type. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/create-custom-document-type-in-s-4hana-public-cloud/qaq-p/12696336#

3. I could not find item category settings:

So, where all the item category controls like billing relevance, stock category, pricing relevance, return indicator etc have moved?

Thanks for your help in advance.

-Anupam

entry.title: Propose Items in Create Sales Order fiori app
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if "Propose Items" in the Create Sales Order fiori app works?

I have setup the "Template for Item Proposal", and then setup the Customer Master Data setting the field values for "Item Proposal" and "PP Customer Procedure".  I thought (or believe) these are all i need to make use of the propose items functionality in the Sales Order.

When i open the fiori app to create a new sales order, select the sold-to party, go to items tab to select... I can see the field is active for "Propose Items".  If i click it, nothing happens, no table pop-up or anything like that that pulls the item proposal template. Item proposal is not working.

However, if i use the old "Create Sales Order -VA01", it works.

Question - is this an expected behaviour in the newer fiori app in Create Sales Order, that Propose Items function is not working?  Or perhaps am i missing a step or setup?

Regards,

Cathy

entry.title: Security Deposits Suppliers - Best Practice
entry.content:
Dear, 

Our customer asked us to the best practice in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for security deposits at the bank by the supplier. Sometimes their suppliers ask for a security deposit. How can they register / post / follow up those deposits? 

I found this SAP Help page but I am wondering if this is only for customers or if this works the same for suppliers? https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/cdccca8e03d74101a0135863bc522b49/2508c5536a51204be10000000a174cb4.html?locale=es-ESversion%3D2208.503

Do we need scope item 2UJ - Contract Accounting - Open Item Management for this? If yes, does this require an extra license? 

Thank you in advance! 

Kind regards,

Vanessa

entry.title: Logo SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello,

We are an SAP Partner and please would appreciate your help providing me with the logo for 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Header Pricing Condition Print Option for Purchase Order Form in S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

We are trying to print PO Header Conditions in output forms as shown below. Below is the setting available that we did to print it as gross value i.e. Making the Print Type as "A"

We are unable to get it in output form. Once we make it to item level with Print Type as "a" it comes in output. 

Is there any other setting to be done?

Thanks in Advance,

entry.title: About Custom CDS View time zone settings
entry.content:
Dear Community

In Custom CDS View, the time zone in the date field is UTC, but is it possible to change it to the local time zone?
In order to use it with an External API, I would like to match it to the time zone (JST) used by the external system.
The Custom CDS VIew is created using the Fiori app.

Regards,

Kyosuke

entry.title: #CoE#JJTOOLS Synchronize delivery quantity with picking quantity during sales shipment posting
entry.content:
When generating sales outbound delivery orders, in the initial interface, the delivery quantity is synchronized with the picking quantity and can be saved normally. However, the picking quantity synchronized before the VL02N shipment was posted and entered into the order for modification became zero.

This is achieved through enhanced synchronization：

Enhanced code：

 

The picking quantity disappeared during vl02n modification

entry.title: ISO XML file in Chinese language in public cloud
entry.content:
Is there any configuration possible to convert the ISO xml file to Chinese language in S4 Hana Public Cloud ?

Banks of china accepts only Chinese contents and therefore ISO xml file generated from SAP (in English) needs to be translated and then uploaded to bank. 

Looking forward for settings/configs/ suggestions.

 

Current process was to prepare an excel and use the AI tool for translation to Chinese and then upload the excel to the bank.

entry.title: Issue: Migration of product posting with Foot-Base UOM having plant level Serial no. profile.
entry.content:
When migrating product data with Foot-Base UOM having plant level Serial no. profile. then it thorw me an error to take base unit of measurement as discrete-PC/Pallet etc. instead of foot measurement which is logically right but when someone posted 1000 material combination of Base_UOM- PC,Foot,Pack in which some with same above data(FT-foot with Serial number) has been migrated and some 16 were throwing an error.(Product Type-HAWA) in S4C public edition tenant.

So i need to know why system took other and left 16 products only, please clarify. It has been uploaded in DEV system. Starter_System having error for uploading all the data which already migrated into the DEV system.is it due to fresh system it was taken or something else in backend?

Please Reply, your valuable reply needs to enhancing the knowledge and better to deliver.

entry.title: Deployment from BAS to SAP S/4HANA Public cloud dev tenant
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm experiencing problems in BAS when deploying a Fiori app to Public cloud development tenant. It is giving me an authentication error even though I'm using right username and password. I have not configured username and password anywhere but destination I am using. I get the same error when entering username and password manually. Any idea what is wrong?

entry.title: VD51 in sap public cloud
entry.content: How is the VD51 transaction code managed in a public cloud system?

entry.title: Long-Term Planning functionality (LTP) in S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
What is the option for simulating MRP to analyze the results for capacity situation in S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: In Which CDS View Can We find the Rating (Credit Management Role) of a BP?
entry.content:
In Which CDS View Can We find the Rating (Credit Management Role) of a BP?

entry.title: SAP workflow integration with external systems
entry.content: There is a rework operation in the SAP workflow. For the sales order approval workflow, clicking on rework can modify the order information of unfinished sales orders.If I choose an external workflow when defining approval requests, then this approval is done through an interface in the external system. Is there an interface for this rework that allows sales orders to have a rework button when approved externally? Clicking on rework in the external system can modify sales order information in the SAP system

entry.title: Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
Let me explain my business scenario.
There are two step of  PR Document.
PR1. Request of Work (Request to Management for start work)
and then after approve, Keep going to PR2
PR2. Request of Material (Request to Management to buy Material)
It is related with Project System WBS. 
Now in SAP S/4 hana Cloud Public edition, we can't create PR to PR Ref Document.
so how can support to my client for this scenario. If have any advice solution,
Please kindly.
Thanks for your contribution.
Regards
Wai Wai
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: S4CO1: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: Exercises
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am having trouble following along with the Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: Exercises. Specifically, the first exercise as directed in the instructions (You can follow an exercise guide here. For the purposes of this system, please start from page 10 and disregard any notes directing you to purchase SAP Learning System Access). I am not able to find the Manage Teams and Responsibilities app to continue on with the exercise. If anyone has figured this out, please advise.

 

 

Best Regards

JamelJ

entry.title: How to mass change user timezone settings in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
I am using manage workforce app for mass users creation with import method below

  • Worker and Work Agreement (Basic Import)

After user creation, Users time zone are UTC by default.

I want to change time zone to "Asia, Kolkata" for all users.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
